title: hypericum subalatum
intro: Hypericum subalatum, also known as mountain St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae) and is native to the western United States. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hypericum subalatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
